member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.GetAllUsers(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: List all users (paginated).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.GetUserById(System.String)
member.summary: Get any user by ID.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.DeactivateUser(System.String)
member.summary: Soft delete — marks user as deactivated.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AdminController.ActivateUser(System.String)
member.summary: Re-activate a user account.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.GetCurrentUser
member.summary: Returns the current authenticated user's profile extracted from the JWT token.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.AuthController.VerifyToken(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Account.VerifyTokenRequest)
member.summary: Validates a JWT token via REST. Returns validity status, user id and roles.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalUsersController.GetUserById(System.String)
member.summary: Fetch basic user profile by ID. Used by Order and Payment services.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalUsersController.BulkLookup(CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UserLookupRequest)
member.summary: Bulk fetch multiple users by a list of IDs.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalUsersController.GetUserByEmail(System.String)
member.summary: Look up a user by email address. Used by Gateway/Auth for credential verification.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.InternalVendorsController.BulkLookup(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Vendor.VendorLookupRequest)
member.summary: Bulk fetch vendor details (name, image_url) by IDs. Used by Gateway/BFF for composition.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.InitializePayment(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentInitRequest)
member.summary: Initialize a payment and get the iyzico Checkout Form.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.ProcessCallback(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentCallbackRequest)
member.summary: Callback called after user completes the iyzico hosted form.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.CapturePayment(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentCaptureRequest)
member.summary: Capture funds for an authorized payment.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.CancelPayment(System.String,CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.Payment.PaymentCancelRequest)
member.summary: Cancel (Void or Refund) a payment.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetPayment(System.String)
member.summary: Get payment details by ID.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.PaymentsController.GetPaymentsByOrder(System.String)
member.summary: Get all payments for an order.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.GetProfile
member.summary: Get the authenticated user's own profile.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.UpdateProfile(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.User.UserUpdateProfileRequest)
member.summary: Update the authenticated user's own profile (name, phone only).

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.GetAddresses
member.summary: List all saved addresses of the authenticated user.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.CreateAddress(CleanArchitecture.Core.DTOs.User.CreateAddressRequest)
member.summary: Add a new delivery address.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.DeleteAddress(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a delivery address.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.GetFavorites(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get favorites with details aggregated from User and Restaurant services.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.AddFavorite(System.String)
member.summary: Add a vendor to favorites.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Controllers.UsersController.RemoveFavorite(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a vendor from favorites.

member.summary: Holder for reflection information generated from Protos/auth.proto

member.summary: File descriptor for Protos/auth.proto

member.summary: Field number for the "userId" field.

member.summary: Service descriptor

member.name: T:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.AuthServiceBase
member.summary: Base class for server-side implementations of AuthService

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.BindService(CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.AuthServiceBase)
member.summary: Creates service definition that can be registered with a server
member.param: An object implementing the server-side handling logic.

member.name: M:CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.BindService(Grpc.Core.ServiceBinderBase,CleanArchitecture.WebApi.Grpc.AuthService.AuthServiceBase)
member.summary: Register service method with a service binder with or without implementation. Useful when customizing the service binding logic. Note: this method is part of an experimental API that can change or be removed without any prior notice.
member.param: Service methods will be bound by calling AddMethod on this object.
An object implementing the server-side handling logic.
